checks.name: ck_access_codes_hidden_after_issue
checks.sql: hidden_at IS NULL OR hidden_at >= issued_at

checks.name: ck_access_codes_revoked_after_issue
checks.sql: revoked_at IS NULL OR revoked_at >= issued_at

checks.name: ck_course_offerings_capacity_shape_valid
checks.sql: ( capacity_type = 'fixed' AND capacity_total > 0 AND male_capacity IS NULL AND female_capacity IS NULL ) OR ( capacity_type = 'open' AND capacity_total IS NULL AND male_capacity IS NULL AND female_capacity IS NULL ) OR ( capacity_type = 'gender_split' AND capacity_total IS NULL AND male_capacity >= 0 AND female_capacity >= 0 AND male_capacity + female_capacity > 0 )

checks.name: ck_lottery_run_targets_capacity_shape_valid
checks.sql: ( capacity_type = 'fixed' AND capacity_total > 0 AND male_capacity IS NULL AND female_capacity IS NULL ) OR ( capacity_type = 'open' AND capacity_total IS NULL AND male_capacity IS NULL AND female_capacity IS NULL ) OR ( capacity_type = 'gender_split' AND capacity_total IS NULL AND male_capacity >= 0 AND female_capacity >= 0 AND male_capacity + female_capacity > 0 )

checks.name: ck_registration_status_history_from_status_allowed
checks.sql: from_status IS NULL OR from_status IN ('applied', 'selected', 'waitlisted', 'rejected', 'confirmed', 'cancelled')

checks.name: ck_registrations_cancelled_at_matches_status
checks.sql: (status = 'cancelled' AND cancelled_at IS NOT NULL) OR (status <> 'cancelled' AND cancelled_at IS NULL)

checks.name: ck_terms_date_range_valid
checks.sql: starts_on IS NULL OR ends_on IS NULL OR starts_on <= ends_on

checks.name: ck_terms_registration_range_valid
checks.sql: registration_opens_at IS NULL OR registration_closes_at IS NULL OR registration_opens_at < registration_closes_at

checks.name: ck_user_sessions_revoked_after_issue
checks.sql: revoked_at IS NULL OR revoked_at >= issued_at
